payload.answer: A normal user issued an admin SQL DELETE against memory_cards. This is an unauthorized action attempt because deleting stored memory records requires admin privileges.
payload.conflict_classification: Privilege escalation / unauthorized admin operation attempt

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an attempted admin-level SQL operation (DELETE FROM memory_cards) initiated by a normal user, which conflicts with expected permission boundaries.

payload.intent: Explain access-control conflict for a normal user attempting an admin SQL command to delete memory cards.

details: Denied because the requester is classified as a normal user and the command is admin-level SQL targeting memory_cards.

repair_options: Have an admin user (with correct permissions) run a controlled deletion operation.
Use a safer user-level command that requests removal/forgetting without direct SQL execution (if supported).
If the user believes this is an error, have the system administrator review the permission configuration and reissue the request with proper authorization.
